children.heading: .—Purpose
children.label: b .—Purpose
children.text: Steelmark Month recognizes the tremendous contribution made by the steel industry in the United States to national security and defense.

children.heading: .—Proclamation
children.label: c .—Proclamation
children.text: The President is requested to issue a proclamation calling on the people of the United States to observe Steelmark Month with appropriate ceremonies and activities.
